# ![][image1]

# **Mastermind**

By Light Leadership

## 

## *Module: Core*

## Design Specifications

This document provides the design specifications for the new product, “Mastermind” by Light Leadership.  These design specifications are comprised of processes, models, and details that describe the implementation of Mastermind through a combination of systems and software development.

![][image2]

Authored by  
**SPACEROCK**

# 

# Modules {#modules}

*Core*  
[Features](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11PnLKEBAPcKDXXLGL7K-Okw1GwBzMpE67R-WFej-ffY/edit#heading=h.22fh4sq0iwsu)  
[Constitutional](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jKMKjjud9F9fTa3hc98J3IcPY8fk03nv8C6KLpMjBu4/edit#heading=h.wu2uc79wgc0p)  
[Scratch Pad](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1G_RrE0gj369yr10PpxNKkL4HpDXP_B67C64ZS4tDNv4/edit)

# Approach {#approach}

This document provides a series of [models](#models), [micro interactions](#micro-interactions-1) and [interactions](#interactions-1) that together, describe the implementation of the Mastermind specifications.  

## Models {#models}

[Models](#models) are referenced throughout the interactions section of this document with accompanying details to convey the implementation of the software specifications.

## Micro Interactions {#micro-interactions}

[Micro interactions](#micro-interactions) are highly reusable interactions that are very common across the system.  An example of a micro interaction may be connecting a user’s social media account, uploading an image, or even a confirmation dialog.

## Interactions {#interactions}

[Interactions](#interactions) describe the implementation of the specification through a series of steps.  These steps often reference a model and provide details to be placed within the model.  An example is below and not all components are required:

| Input | \[List of inputs used in the interaction\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| User | [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): Sphere Roles: \[Type of Sphere Role\] and/or \[Type of Sphere Role\] able to engage this interaction. |
| Ref | Includes any: [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=1212275708): \[Requirement Identifier\], \[Requirement Identifier\] [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302): \[String Dictionary Identifier\] [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076): \[Queuing Matrix Identifier\] [Algorithms](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dydHZVOLejWcRYJV-ysf-MKBFZQWiHmbK_pS8byktcg/edit#gid=305688076): \[Algorithms Identifier\] [Configurations](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sFduf5NRuZ3BOUUJW2J1P5Y5TCEH3-xKZB9SqsbfoqI/edit#gid=1191989569): \[Configurations Identifier\] [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): \[References Identifier\] [In-App Purchases](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1fFOAKcjgNhpjDQEdk_ftdvnUje-90yVEofs20kaDDu0/edit#gid=750722774): \[In-App Purchases Identifier\] [Data Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1lAGnbLjw0lRUnW36MzgVKtev2UvkzOJHLl5AbacbCQc/edit#gid=0): \[Data Dictionary Identifier\] [Glossary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FsZsibJGi6XghKV2geGp7tXxqdOfUpvXgit21hkyP40/edit#gid=0): \[Glossary Identifier\] [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit): \[Rules Identifier\]  |
| Main | Entry Point |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Sphere Logo) “What role best describes you?” \>  Body \> Items: \[Visionary, Entrepreneur, Investor, Teacher, Student, Other\] Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.2?) | Conditional state e.g. {First Time} \> [Model](#models) \> |

The above example starts with the Simple Card model.  See the [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) model.  The example continues, defining parameters to be placed within the Simple Card model:

1. The Sphere’s logo  
2. The Title as “What role best describes you?”  
3. Items are referenced as User Types,   
4. The action, labeled “Continue” with an action to continue  
5. The secondary action, labeled “Back” with an action to go back

Interactions may include process diagrams depending on the complexity of the interaction.  They may also contain parameters that are required to be true in order to start the interaction. For example, in order for a user to [create a sphere](#create-sphere), they may be required to have completed [sign up](#sign-up).

## Model Interaction \#1 {#model-interaction-#1}

| User | [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): Sphere Roles: \[User Types\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=813408476): Sphere [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=1822425320): Input Rules: Email Rule [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302): Basic Meeting Summary [Configurations](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sFduf5NRuZ3BOUUJW2J1P5Y5TCEH3-xKZB9SqsbfoqI/edit#gid=305688076): Sphere: \#1  |
| (A.1) | [Input](#input) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Let’s get some basic information about you” \>  Placeholder: “name@email.com” \> {Email Rule} \>  Placeholder: “Confirm email” \> {Email Rule} \> Placeholder: “xxxxxxxxxxxx” \> {Basic Meeting Summary} Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |

| ----- | ----- | ----- |

| ![][image6] | ![][image7] | ![][image8] |

| *Actions* | *Timeline* | *Inform* |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| ![][image9] | ![][image10] | ![][image11] |

| *List Section* | *List Date* | *List Search* |

# Micro Interactions {#micro-interactions-1}

## Connect {#connect}

| Input | \[Requirements\] \[Platform\] \[Icon\] \[Title\] \[Summary\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=813408476): Federated Login |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon \[Icon\]) \> Title: \[Title\] \>  Body: Optional Action: *Vendor logo respective to* \[Platform\] \> {Federated Login} and \[Requirements\] \> *Success checkmark \>* Body: Summary \> \[Summary\] \>  Secondary Action: \[Secondary Action\] \>  Primary Action: \[Primary Action\] \>  |

## Upload Image {#upload-image}

| Input | \[Title\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=1822425320): Input Rules: Image Rule [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=813408476): Authorizations |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: \[Title\] \>  Body: (Camera Icon) \> Button \> Native options (e.g. “Take a Photo” or “Choose from library”) \> Image Cropper: Image Area (Full Screen) \> {Image Rule} \> *Rectangle 1:1 ratio overlaying the image input with inner area of circle transparent and outer area of circle opaque and moveable to crop and zoom in or out of the image* \> Secondary Action: “Cancel” \> Primary Action: “Save” \> *(Crop image accordingly)* \>  |

## 

## 

## Input  {#input}

| Input | \[Title\] \[Body\] \[Placeholder\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=1822425320): Input Rules: Short Text |
| (A.1) | [Input](#bookmark=id.z337ya) \> (Icon) \> Title: \[Title\] \>  \[Body\] \> \[Placeholder\] \> {Short Text} \> *user enters text \>* Secondary Action: \[Secondary Action\] *\>*  Primary Action: \[Primary Action\] *\>*  |

## Invitation {#invitation}

| Input | \[Title\] \[Body\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> (Icon) \> Title: \[Title\] \>  Body: \[Body\] \>   Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \>  |

## Add {#add}

| Input | \[Icon\] \[Title\] \[Secondary Action\] \[Primary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon \[Icon\]) \> Title: \[Title\] \>   Body: Item \> [Input](#input) \> Body: Remove \> Secondary Action:  \[Secondary Action\] \> Primary Action: \[Primary Action\] \> |

## Confirmation {#confirmation}

| Input | \[Title\] \[Body\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> (Icon) \> Title: \[Title\] \> \[Body\] \>  Secondary Action: \[Secondary Action\] \> Primary Action: \[Primary Action\] \> |

## Web Viewer {#web-viewer}

| Input | \[Website\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | \[WebViewer\] *A Native Web Viewer slides up and loads \>* \[Website\] \>  Primary Action: “(X)” \> *The user may slide down the WebView or click the (X) in the upper right \>* |

## Help {#help}

| Input | \[Topic\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Requirement](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=704711557): Help to Wiki |
| Main | {Help to Wiki} \> [Web Viewer](#web-viewer) \> *A Native Web Viewer slides up and loads the wiki page while passing the topic as a query string parameter (e.g. [https://lightleadership.com/wiki?topic=\[Topic](https://lightleadership.com/wiki?topic=%5BTopic)\]) \>* |

## Congratulations {#congratulations}

| Input | \[Summary\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Party Icon) \> Title: “Congratulations, \[User Name\]\!” \>  Body: \[Summary\] Primary Action: \[Primary Action\] \> |

## Text Editor {#text-editor}

| Input | \[Title\] \[Placeholder\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Autosave |
| (A.1) | [Text Editor](#bookmark=id.xvir7l) \> Title: \[Title\] \> Placeholder: \[Placeholder\] |
| (A.2) | Secondary Action “\[Secondary Action\]” \>  Primary Action “\[Primary Action\]” \> |

## 

## Review {#review}

| Input | \[(Icon)\] \[Title\] \[Summary\] \[Primary Action\] \[Secondary Action\]  |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> \[(Icon)\] \> Title: “\[Title\]” \> Body: *\[Contains a scrollable container with a* \[Summary\] *of  all data submitted within the interaction or data set being reviewed\] \>* Secondary Action “\[Secondary Action\]” \>  Primary Action “\[Primary Action\]” \> |

## Search {#search}

| Input | \[Text Imput\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | *Users will be able to search for different items throughout the app (Ex. users, spheres, help, meetings, records, etc.)* |

# Interactions {#interactions-1}

## Login {#login}

| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Federated Login |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Login](#bookmark=id.44sinio) \> (LL Logo) \>  Body: Text Input: Placeholder: “Username” \> *User enters username \>* Body: Text Input: Placeholder: “Password” \> *User enters password\>* Secondary Action: “SIGN UP” \> [Sign Up](#sign-up) Primary Action: “LOGIN” \> [Landing Page](#home) Optional Action: “Login with Facebook” \> [Login with Facebook](#login-with-facebook) Optional Action: “Login with Google” \> [Login with Google](#login-with-google) Optional Action: “Forgot Password” \> [Forgot Password](#forgot-password) |

## Login with Facebook {#login-with-facebook}

| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Federated Login |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | WebViewer \> *Appears using the native web viewer of the device and allows the user to login with Facebook following the latest industry standard flow.* |

## Login with Google {#login-with-google}

| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Federated Login |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | WebViewer \> *Appears using the native web viewer of the device and allows the user to login with Google following the latest industry standard flow.* |

## Forgot Password {#forgot-password}

| Ref | [Requirement](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=704711557): Forgot Password |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> Title: “Reset your password” Description: “Enter your email below to reset your password” Text Input: Placeholder: “[name@email.com](mailto:name@email.com)” Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Submit” \> |
| (A.1) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Sign Up {#sign-up}

| Ref | [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): Definitions: First Time [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=1822425320): Input Rules: Email Rule [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302): Light Leadership Ecosystem Summary, Connect with Google, Connect with Facebook |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Login](#bookmark=id.44sinio) \> (LL Logo) \> Body \> Item: “Sign up” \> |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Welcome to the Mastermind Ecosystem” \>   Body: {Mastermind Ecosystem Summary} \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \>  |
| (A.2) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “What role best describes you?” \> Body \> Items: Visionary, Entrepreneur, Investor, Teacher, Student, Other \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.3) | [Input](#input) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Verify your email” \>  Placeholder: “name@email.com” \> {Email Rule} \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.4) | [Input](#input) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Let’s get some basic information about you”  \>  Placeholder: *“*First Name” \>  Placeholder: “Last Name” \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.5) | [Input](#input) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Let’s secure your account” \>  Placeholder: *“*Password” \> Password Rule \>  Placeholder: “Confirm Password” \> Password Rule \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.6) | {First Time} \> [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “We recommend connecting with Google” \>  Body: Button: “Connect with Google” \> *Connects user’s account with Google following industry standard interaction* \>  Body: Paragraph: {Connect with Google} \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.7) | {First Time} \> [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “We recommend connecting with Facebook” \>  Body: Button: “Connect with Facebook” \> *Connects user’s account with Facebook following industry standard interaction* \>  *(The user’s profile photo will default as their Facebook profile photo)*  Body: Paragraph: {Connect with Facebook} \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.8) | {First Time} \> [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “We recommend connecting with Facebook” \>  Body: Paragraph: “We recommend syncing your Facebook news feed for a more integrative experience.  Would you like your Facebook newsfeed synced?”   Body: Paragraph: {Connect with Facebook} \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Optional Action: “Skip” \> Primary Action: “Yes” \> |
| (A.9) | [Upload Image](#upload-image) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Add a photo of you” \>  Body: Image: \[Default: Camera icon (or Facebook profile photo)\] \>  [Upload Image](#upload-image) \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.10) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Customize what we’re communicating with you” \>  Body: *List of notification options with on/off toggle* \> Items: \[News, Feature Updates, Events\] \> Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Continue” \>  |
| (A.11) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (LL Logo) \> Title: “Welcome Home” \> Body: {Home Summary} \> Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Got it” \> [Home](#home) \> |
| (A.12) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Home {#home}

| Ref | Context: First Run, Active Sphere |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Home (First Run)](#bookmark=id.3j2qqm3) \> Title: “\[User Name\]” \> Body: *Timeline/Newsfeed* Body: Items: *display clickable icons of each sphere the user is apart of* \> *user selects/clicks icon of sphere* \> *Selected* [Home (Sphere)](#bookmark=id.4i7ojhp) \> Light Button: [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \>  Right Action: (Inbox) \> [Inbox](#heading=h.3hv69ve) \> Left Action: (Home) \> [Home](#bookmark=id.1x0gk37) \> |

## Newsfeed {#newsfeed}

*Users will be able to view a live stream of the different features within the app such as Invites, Tasks, Notifications, Inbox, Messages, Calendar, Events, Selected Social Media Threads, etc.*

## Dashboard {#dashboard}

| Main | [Home](#home) \> *User slides up from bottom bar \>* |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Dashboard](#dashboard) \> *The dashboard is a core experience of Mastermind that evolves as the user deepens in the experience.  The dashboard adapts according to the upgrades and options selected by the Sphere. \>* Sphere Slider \> *Represents each Sphere the current user is a member of.  Contains a notification badge that represents the number of notifications within that Sphere.  When selected, [Home](#home) receives the selected sphere as the “Active Sphere.”  By clicking the “+” sign, [Create Sphere](#create-sphere) is initiated.* |

## Create Sphere {#create-sphere}

| Ref | [Requirement](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=704711557): Max Sphere Limit [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302): Visionary Summary |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Home](#home) \> [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \> Item: “Create Sphere” \>  |
| (A.1?) | {Max Sphere Limit} \> [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> Title: “You cannot join or create anymore Spheres.” \>  Primary Action: “Got it.” \> [Home](#home) \> |
| (A.2) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Sphere Visionary Introduction” \>   Body: {Visionary Summary} \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \>  |
| (A.3) | [Input](#input) \> Title: “What’s the name of your Sphere?” \> Body \> Placeholder: “Sphere Name” \> *user enters sphere name*  Secondary Action: “Back ”\> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.4) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “What type best describes your Sphere?” \>  Body: Items: Company, Student Group, Household, Non-Profit, Other \>  Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.5) | [Upload Image](#upload-image) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Add a logo” \> |
| (A.6) | [Text Editor](#text-editor) \> Title: “What is the vision of your Sphere?” \>  Body: *Visionary User inputs* \[Vision Statement\] \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.7) | [Add](#add) \> [Invite Members](#invite-member) \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.8) | [Congratulations](#congratulations) \> Body: “\[Sphere Name\] has been created\!” \> Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> [Sphere Onboarding](#sphere-onboarding) |
| (A.9) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Join Sphere {#join-sphere}

| Main | [Home](#home) \> [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \> Item: “Join Sphere” \> |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Input](#input) \> Title: “Enter your invite code” \> Body \> Placeholder: “Invite Code” \> Secondary Action: “Back ”\> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.2) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Manage Members {#manage-members}

| Input | \[Sphere Members\] \[(Icon)\] \[User Name\] \[Sphere Role\] \[User Email\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Dashboard](#dashboard) \> Item: (Icon) “Members” \>  [Tabs](#bookmark=id.4h042r0) \> Title: “Members” \>  (\<) \= *Model will have a ‘back arrow’ which takes the user back one interaction \>* Tab: “Members” \> [List](#bookmark=id.2w5ecyt) \> \[Sphere Members\] \> Items: \[(Icon)\] \[User Name\] \[Sphere Role\] \> [Member Profile](#member-profile) \> Tab: “Invites" \> [List](#bookmark=id.2w5ecyt) \> Items: \[(Icon)\], \[User Email\], Expiration Date *Displays the current invites to the Sphere in order of newest invite to oldest invite \>* (X) \> [Cancel Invite](#cancel-invite) \> Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Invite” \> [Invite Member](#invite-member) \>  |

## Member Profile {#member-profile}

| Input | \[Profile Image\] \[User Name\] \[User Email\] \[First Name\] \[Last Name\] \[Phone Number\] \[Sphere Role\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=1306026369): In-App Messaging |
| Main | [Manage Members](#manage-members) \>  [Tabs](#bookmark=id.4h042r0) \> Title: “Members” \> [List](#bookmark=id.2w5ecyt) \> Items: \[Sphere Members\] \> *User clicks on a member in the list* |
| (A.1) | Profile \> \[Profile Image\] \> Title: \[User Name\] \>  (\<) \= *Model will have a ‘back arrow’ which takes the user back one interaction \>* Body: \[User Email\] \> *hyperlinked for emailing* Body: \[First Name\] Body: \[Last Name\] Body: \[Phone Number\] \> *hyperlinked for phone call* Body: \[Sphere Role\] Secondary Action: “Message” \> {In-App Messaging} \> Primary Action: “Remove Member” \> [Remove Member](#remove-member) \> |

## 

## Remove Member {#remove-member}

| Input | \[User Name\] \[Sphere Name\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Remove Member Default |
| (A.1) | [Confirmation](#confirmation) \> Title: “Remove Member?” Body: “Are you sure you want to remove \[User Name\] from \[Sphere Name\]? \>  Secondary Action: “Cancel” \> Primary Action: “Remove” \> {Remove Member Default} |
| (A.2) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Invite Member {#invite-member}

| Ref | [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit#gid=890643337): Sphere Capacity [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=1822425320): Input Rules: Email Rule |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Manage Members](#manage-members) \> [Tabs](#bookmark=id.4h042r0) \> Primary Action: “Invite” \> |
| (A.1) | {Sphere Capacity} \> [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> Title: “\[Sphere Name\] is at maximum capacity.” \>  Body: “Would you like to create a sub-sphere within \[Sphere Name\]?” \> Optional Action: “Create Sub-Sphere” \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action: “Dismiss” \>  |
| (A.2) | [Input](#input) \> Title: “Invite Member” \> Placeholder: “[name@email.com](mailto:name@email.com)” \> {Email Rule} \> Secondary Action: “Back” \> Primary Action : “Send” \> |
| (A.3) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Cancel Invite {#cancel-invite}

| (A.1) | [Confirmation](#confirmation) \> Title: “Cancel Invite?” Body: “Are you sure you want to delete this invitation? \>  Secondary Action: “Cancel” \> Primary Action: “Delete” \> |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.2) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Sphere Invite {#sphere-invite}

| Input | \[Vision Statement\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Main | [Invitation](#invitation) \> Title: “You have been invited to join \[Sphere Name\]\!” \>  Body: Slider: \[Vision Statement\] (*each paragraph of as slide) \>*  Secondary Action: “Decline” \> [Decline](#decline) Primary Action: “Accept” \> [Sphere Onboarding](#sphere-onboarding) \> |
| (A.2) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Sphere Onboarding {#sphere-onboarding}

| Input | \[Sphere Name\] \[Vision Statement\]\[Core Value Statements\] |
| :---- | :---- |
| Ref | [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302): Sphere Summary, Mastermind Tools Summary [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): Definitions: First Time |
| Main | [Home (Sphere)](#bookmark=id.4i7ojhp) \> [Dashboard](#dashboard) \> Tasks \> Item: “\[Sphere Name\] Onboarding” \> |
| (A.1) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (LL Logo) \> Title: “Sphere Introduction” \>  Body: {Sphere Summary} \>  Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.2) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Sphere Logo) \> Title: “Welcome to \[Sphere Name\].” \>  Body: Slider: \[Vision Statement\] (*each paragraph of as slide) \>* Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Continue” \> |
| (A.3) | [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Sphere Logo) \> Title: “\[Sphere Name\] Core Values.” \>  Body: Slider: \[Core Value Statements\] (*each paragraph of as slide) \>* Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Join \[Sphere Name\]” \> |
| (A.4) | *Sphere has been upgraded to ‘Legally Anchored’ \>* [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Sphere Logo) \> Title: “Build Perspective Lens” \>  Body: {Brief Perspective Lens Summary} \> Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Build” \> [Build Perspective Lens](#heading=h.1baon6m) *\>* |
| (A.5) | {First Time} \> [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (LL Logo) \> Title: “Introducing your Mastermind Tools” \>  Body: {Mastermind Tools Summary} \>  Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \> Primary Action: “Got it\!” \> [Home (Sphere)](#bookmark=id.4i7ojhp) \> |
| (A.6) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Decline {#decline}

| Ref | [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056): Auto Responses: Decline |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Input](#input) \> Title: “Decline reason...” \>  Body: Placeholder: *User may select* {Decline} *or enter text \>*  Secondary Action: “Dismiss” \>  Primary Action: “Send” \> |
| (A.2) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

## Leave Sphere {#leave-sphere}

| Main | [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \> Item: “Leave Sphere” \>  |
| :---- | :---- |
| (A.1) | [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> Title: “Confirmation?” \> Body: “Are you sure you want to leave the sphere?” \>  Secondary Action: “Cancel” \> Primary Action: “Yes” \> |
| (A.2) | [Inform](#bookmark=id.2iq8gzs) \> Title: “Reason for leaving?” \> Placeholder: “Reason for leaving...”  Secondary Action: “Back” \>  Primary Action: “Leave” \> |
| (A.3) | [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076) |

# 

# References {#references}

1) [String Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZD8AbMmKIoQmz0b5M6BFE1LOd0PtKLH3GtqLiKcClD4/edit#gid=1544739302)  
2) [Queuing Matrix](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1PIR3tjpoEz8kchzzFOE13GW3CGQ-BjmL5JQa5-JGMkM/edit#gid=305688076)  
3) [Algorithms](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dydHZVOLejWcRYJV-ysf-MKBFZQWiHmbK_pS8byktcg/edit#gid=305688076)  
4) [Configurations](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sFduf5NRuZ3BOUUJW2J1P5Y5TCEH3-xKZB9SqsbfoqI/edit#gid=1191989569)  
5) [References](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1bhaeFPF0rdQVtwI5RAv1T2kAt3TMuTRo0gt9mKNLL-E/edit#gid=625056)  
6) [In-App Purchases](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1fFOAKcjgNhpjDQEdk_ftdvnUje-90yVEofs20kaDDu0/edit#gid=750722774)  
7) [Drive Structure](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/1E5YAW38OrMC5EHuiKeO3IOroz98eOx6g) \- The Sphere, Household, and Member Drives offer a two-way sync between the Sphere Drive and the application cache. The implementation of the Sphere Drive may use Google Drive or GSuite.  
8) [Glossary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FsZsibJGi6XghKV2geGp7tXxqdOfUpvXgit21hkyP40/edit#gid=0)  
9) [Data Dictionary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1lAGnbLjw0lRUnW36MzgVKtev2UvkzOJHLl5AbacbCQc/edit#gid=0)  
10) [Rules](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-smEfYtMe80F6S3w-XRZz8J19jAz83fzh8WJ6rx9b3g/edit#gid=0)  
11) [Requirements](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rfOpPsyfxreq8nh2HXDXcedUJXgsUur1S6GStbgbTDQ/edit)

# 

# 

# SOP NOTES {#sop-notes}

**Name Sequencing \-** assuming that the header carries down to sub-categories; the header is not echoed in the sub-categories; assumes that the user is able to cognitively hold the context of the interaction as they continue through.

	E.g. [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \> Item: “Voting” \> [Actions](#bookmark=id.2xcytpi) \> Item: “Initiate (‘Vote’ is inferred)” \>

**Interactions** \- The interaction should only output to end points, and should not contain entry points as references.  

**String Dictionary** \- use for long strings of text; generally as a ‘Summary’ for an [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) module.  
	  
	E.g. [Simple Card](#bookmark=id.2jxsxqh) \> (Icon) \> Title: “Title of Simple Card Module” \> Body: {String Dictionary Identifier} \> 

Secondary Action: “Back”	\>  
Primary Action: “Action” \>  
	

**Requirements** \- Open ended, abstract requirements that give broad instructions for developers to work within. Keeping the requirements broadly based allows for the developers to remain innovative and creative while achieving the goal of the feature. Requirements are more systems related than user related.

**Queuing Matrix** \- The Queuing Matrix in combination with interactions emcompasses the processes of which ‘notifications’ emerge. Notifications are basically system-queued interactions that are triggered when user(s) complete or don’t complete, take action or don’t take action, etc, as the game play continues, based on the requirement that “the system shall provide a queuing mechanism to schedule, order, and remind event type data for the user.”

Queuing Matrix is not the primary entry point. For example, the interaction is not concerned about entry points such as the Queuing Matrics. 

**Configurations** \- In this case, configurations are meant to be a ‘membrane’ to the Sphere or User with encoded rules of how their organism functions. Configurations are meant to be defaulted or openly adjusted by the user(s) as the game play continues and they choose to change how their organism functions. 

Most configurations can feel like a ‘requirement,’ however, requirements are meant to be more open ended. Configurations are more user related while requirements are more system related.

**References** \- References are for ‘catch-all’ definitions list, user roles, module rules, action types, etc.

**Algorithms** \- Algorithms are system calculations that are prioritized and triggered by interactions and system processes. These are developed solely for the system to run and display results to the user(s) based on requirements and system configurations. 

**In-App Purchases** \- A table to outline the flow for in-app purchases and upgrades.

**Data Dictionary** \- Series of tables to house lists of data.

**Rules** \- Concrete rules to abide by.  If x, then y.
